description.intro: 8 years of software development experience. Now an AI Engineer independently building dating-matching and interest-based meetup community apps, owning rapid iteration from product planning and AI implementation to iOS launch. Previously led an 11-person engineering team building 12 game products.
description.specialization: Specializing in integrating Claude AI into products (smart matching, chat coaching, content moderation), plus full-stack development, performance optimization, and system quality.
